title: Student can sign up, verify email via OTP bypass, and reach dashboard
description: Verifies a new student can register, complete email verification using the test OTP bypass, and land on the student dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup.php
Select the student role
Fill in the name field with Test Student
Fill in the email field with test.student+1@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the signup form
Fill in the OTP field with 123456
Submit the email verification form
Verify the user lands on the student dashboard

title: Guest attempting to book is forced to log in
description: Verifies that a guest user cannot create a booking and is redirected to authentication when starting the booking flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /explore.php
Click a PG card to open its details
Open the booking flow from the PG detail page
Attempt to submit the booking request
Verify the user is taken to the login page or shown a login-required gate

title: Student can log in with valid credentials and reach dashboard
description: Verifies an existing student can log in and is redirected to the student dashboard with an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup.php
Select the student role
Fill in the name field with Login Seed
Fill in the email field with login.student@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the signup form
Fill in the OTP field with 123456
Submit the email verification form
Click the logout action
Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with login.student@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the student dashboard

title: Verified student can request a booking and see it in bookings list
description: Verifies a verified student can submit a request booking and then find the pending reservation in their bookings page.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup.php
Select the student role
Fill in the name field with Request Booker
Fill in the email field with request.booker@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the signup form
Fill in the OTP field with 123456
Submit the email verification form
Click the link to explore PGs
Click a PG card to open its details
Open the booking flow from the PG detail page
Select a room type with availability
Select booking type as request
Select pay at property as the payment option
Select a valid move-in date
Select a valid duration in months
Submit the booking
Click the link to view the user's bookings
Verify the new booking appears in the user's bookings list with a pending status indicator

title: Verified student can complete an instant booking and see confirmation state
description: Verifies a verified student can place an instant booking and receives a confirmed booking state in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup.php
Select the student role
Fill in the name field with Instant Booker
Fill in the email field with instant.booker@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the signup form
Fill in the OTP field with 123456
Submit the email verification form
Click the link to explore PGs
Click a PG card to open its details
Open the booking flow from the PG detail page
Select a room type with availability
Select booking type as instant
Select online as the payment option
Submit the booking
Verify a booking confirmation state is displayed for the created booking

title: Cancel a pending booking from booking history
description: Verifies a student can create a booking request and then cancel it from booking history, resulting in the booking showing as cancelled.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to browse PG listings
Select any PG from the results to open its detail page
Start a booking request from the PG detail page
On the booking page, choose the request booking option and submit the booking
Click the link to open the student bookings page
Cancel the most recent pending booking
Verify the cancelled booking appears with status cancelled

title: Account lockout activates after repeated failed logins
description: Verifies that repeated incorrect login attempts trigger an account locked state that blocks further sign-in attempts.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup.php
Select the student role
Fill in the name field with Lockout Seed
Fill in the email field with lockout.student@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the signup form
Fill in the OTP field with 123456
Submit the email verification form
Click the logout action
Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with lockout.student@example.com
Fill in the password field with WrongPass1!
Submit the login form
Submit the login form
Submit the login form
Submit the login form
Submit the login form
Submit the login form
Verify an account locked error state is visible

title: Guest can filter, sort, and paginate PG results
description: Verifies a guest can apply filters, change sorting, and navigate pagination while staying within the filtered result set.

steps.description: Navigate to /explore.php
Select an area filter value
Select a gender filter value
Select at least one amenities filter value
Select a sort option that orders by price low-to-high
Click to go to the next page of results
Verify PG cards are displayed and pagination controls are available

title: View student dashboard with saved PGs, recent bookings, and notifications summary
description: Verifies a logged-in student can open the dashboard and see an overview including saved PGs, recent bookings, and unread notifications count.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the student dashboard
Verify the student dashboard overview is displayed with sections for saved PGs and recent bookings
Verify an unread notifications count indicator is displayed

title: See booking confirmation and receipt/notification surfaced on student dashboard after instant booking
description: Verifies that after an instant booking the student can see the confirmed booking reflected and a receipt/notification surfaced on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to browse PG listings
Select any PG from the results to open its detail page
Start an instant booking from the PG detail page
On the booking page, choose instant booking and select the online payment option
Submit the booking
Click the link to open the student dashboard
Verify the recent bookings section includes a confirmed booking entry
Verify a payment receipt or booking notification is visible on the dashboard

title: Sign up blocks duplicate email registration
description: Verifies that attempting to register with an email already used by an account is prevented with an inline error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup.php
Select the student role
Fill in the name field with Seed User
Fill in the email field with dup.student@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the signup form
Navigate to /signup.php
Select the student role
Fill in the name field with Duplicate User
Fill in the email field with dup.student@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the signup form
Verify an email already registered validation error is visible

title: View full booking history from student bookings page
description: Verifies a logged-in student can open the bookings page and see a full history list with statuses and available actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the student bookings page
Verify a booking history list is displayed
Verify booking entries show a status and at least one available action where applicable

title: Guest can open a PG detail page from explore results
description: Verifies that selecting a listing from the explore grid opens the corresponding PG detail view with booking entry available.

steps.description: Navigate to /explore.php
Click a PG card to open its details
Verify PG details are displayed and a booking entry point is available

title: Accept a pending booking request as owner and confirm student notification appears
description: Verifies an owner can accept a student’s pending booking request and the booking moves to confirmed with a corresponding student notification created.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to browse PG listings
Open any PG detail page and start a booking request
Choose the request booking option and submit the booking
Click the option to log out
Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open owner bookings management
Accept the most recent pending booking request
Verify the booking is shown as confirmed in the owner bookings list

title: Guest search query returns a list of matching PGs
description: Verifies entering a search query filters the explore results to a relevant subset without errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /explore.php
Fill a specific PG name query into the search field
Submit the search
Verify PG cards are displayed as search results

title: Prevent direct cancellation of a confirmed booking from student bookings page
description: Verifies a student cannot directly cancel a confirmed booking from booking history and is shown a validation error indicating a cancellation request is required.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to browse PG listings
Select any PG from the results to open its detail page
Start an instant booking from the PG detail page
On the booking page, choose instant booking and select the online payment option
Submit the booking
Click the link to open the student bookings page
Attempt to cancel the confirmed booking
Verify a cancellation validation error is displayed indicating confirmed bookings require a cancellation request flow

title: Invalid password shows login error without creating a session
description: Verifies that logging in with an incorrect password shows an invalid-credentials error and does not sign the user in.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup.php
Select the student role
Fill in the name field with Wrong Pass Seed
Fill in the email field with wrongpass.student@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the signup form
Fill in the OTP field with 123456
Submit the email verification form
Click the logout action
Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with wrongpass.student@example.com
Fill in the password field with NotTheRightPass1!
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Create a new PG listing with required steps and minimum photos
description: Verifies an owner can complete the multi-step add listing flow including at least three photos and ends with the listing in pending status.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to add a new PG listing
Fill in the basic listing information with valid values and proceed to the next step
Add at least one room type with a valid bed count and pricing and proceed to the next step
Select amenities and proceed to the next step
Add at least three photos and submit the listing
Verify a listing creation confirmation is visible
Verify the new listing appears with pending status in the owner listings or dashboard view

title: View owner dashboard summary metrics
description: Verifies a logged-in owner can open the owner dashboard and see summary cards for listings, pending bookings, and earnings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the owner dashboard
Verify summary cards are displayed for total listings, pending bookings, and earnings this month

title: Invalid or expired OTP is rejected during email verification
description: Verifies that entering an incorrect OTP during email verification shows an error and the account remains unverified.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup.php
Select the student role
Fill in the name field with OTP Negative
Fill in the email field with otp.bad@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Submit the signup form
Fill in the OTP field with 000000
Submit the email verification form
Verify an invalid or expired OTP validation error is visible

title: Manage saved PGs list from student saved page
description: Verifies a logged-in student can open the saved PGs page and manage the list by removing a saved PG, resulting in the list updating.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to browse PG listings
Select any PG from the results to open its detail page
Save the PG to the saved list
Click the link to open the saved PGs page
Remove the saved PG from the list
Verify the saved PG no longer appears in the saved list

title: Block listing submission when fewer than three photos are provided
description: Verifies the add listing flow prevents submission when the owner provides fewer than three photos and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to add a new PG listing
Fill in the basic listing information with valid values and proceed to the next step
Add at least one room type with a valid bed count and pricing and proceed to the next step
Select amenities and proceed to the next step
Add fewer than three photos
Submit the listing
Verify a photos validation error is displayed
Verify the listing is not created as a pending listing

title: Unknown area shows a no-results state with clear-filters option
description: Verifies that selecting an area with no matches shows a no-results empty state and offers a way to clear filters.

steps.description: Navigate to /explore.php
Select an area filter value that yields no results
Apply the filters
Verify a no-results empty state is displayed with an option to clear filters

title: Invalid price filter input is blocked with validation feedback
description: Verifies that an invalid price range value entered through the UI is rejected and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /explore.php
Fill a negative value into the maximum price field
Apply the filters
Verify a price range validation error is visible

title: Approve a pending listing and verify it appears under approved tab
description: Verifies an admin can approve a pending listing and the listing becomes visible under approved listings in the moderation page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open admin listings moderation
Select the pending listings tab
Approve the first pending listing
Select the approved listings tab
Verify the approved listing appears in the approved list

title: Reject a pending listing with a reason and verify it appears in rejected tab
description: Verifies an admin can reject a pending listing with a reason and the listing is then shown under rejected listings with the reason available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open admin listings moderation
Select the pending listings tab
Open the first pending listing moderation actions
Provide a rejection reason
Submit the rejection
Select the rejected listings tab
Verify the rejected listing appears in the rejected list
Verify the rejected listing shows a rejection reason

title: Review pending listings in admin moderation queue
description: Verifies an admin can open the listings moderation page and view pending listings with relevant metadata.

steps.description: Navigate to /login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open admin listings moderation

Verify a list of pending listings is displayed with listing metadata
